name: Ebenezer Park
description: Ebenezer Park is a place to play pickleball in Florence, SC. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Johnsonville United Methodist Church
description: Johnsonville United Methodist Church is a place to play pickleball in Johnsonville, SC. There is 1 indoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Pearl Moore Center
description: Pearl Moore Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Florence, SC. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: Only open for pickleball 9 am - 12:30pm Mon-Thu

name: Quinby Sports Complex
description: Quinby Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Quinby, SC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Spurious Sports
description: This court does not exist and is exists only for testing. It's not a pickleball court. Please do not come here expecting to play pickleball.

name: Timrod Park
description: Parking is limited. Players can park behind the new tennis courts in the grass along the stream.
